notes: Secondary standard pyranometer. GHI-B covers bifacial rear irradiance. POA-1 and RPOA-2 are redundant tilted sensors for cross-validation.
Average of all 6 channels written to temp_mod_avg_c. Individual channels stored for degradation / hot-spot analysis.
Use WS_AVG (not instantaneous WS) for Faiman thermal model. WD_AVG used for soiling analysis (wind direction vs soiling rate).
